cards.back: The process of converting plaintext into unreadable ciphertext to protect data from unauthorized access
An open-source management platform for automating and managing virtualized infrastructure, including virtual machines and storage
A trusted platform module (TPM) that provides a secure environment for virtual machines and other applications to run in
Pre-built, shared images of operating systems and applications that can be used across multiple virtual machines to reduce deployment time and costs
The operating system that manages and controls the other virtual machines and infrastructure in a cloud environment
